title: ClawBench Test Case
description: Schema for ClawBench test case task.json files

metadata.description: Human-readable metadata for documentation purposes (not read by the agent)

task_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the test case

metaclass.description: High-level category of the test case

class.description: Granular sub-category of the test case

description.description: Human-readable description of the test case

sites_involved.description: Site domains involved in the test case (e.g., google.com, uber.com, github.com, etc.)

platform.description: Platform involved in the test case (e.g., google, uber, github, etc.)

common_info.description: Common information that is shared among all test cases

email_credentials.const: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account

user_info.const: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information

user_resume.const: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction.description: Task prompt sent to the agent

eval_schema.description: Configuration for the request interceptor. The interceptor blocks HTTP requests matching the URL pattern, method, and optional body/params filters, preventing irreversible actions (checkout, submission, etc.) from reaching the server.

url_pattern.description: Regex pattern the request URL must match to be blocked by the interceptor

method.description: HTTP method the request must match to be blocked

body.description: Key-value pairs that must match exactly in the request body. Used to disambiguate when URL + method alone isn't specific enough (e.g., same endpoint for login vs send).

params.description: Key-value pairs that must match exactly in the URL query parameters. Used to disambiguate when URL + method alone isn't specific enough.

time_limit.description: Maximum time in minutes before the driver stops the container

extra_info.description: Additional context injected into the agent prompt

path.description: Relative path to a file in the test case directory (optional)

description.description: Description text injected into the agent prompt

judge_context.description: Hidden context used only by the LLM judge; never injected into the agent prompt.

reference_solution.description: Reference solution or expected answer details

source_task_yaml.description: Raw source task.yaml content, when converted from another corpus
